---
title: "Assignment Template"
author: "First_Name Last_Name - Student_Number"
date: '2019-01-14'
output: pdf_document
toc: TRUE 
number_sections: TRUE 
fig_caption: TRUE
df_print: tibble 
fontsize: 12pt 
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{amsmath}          
---
```{r Load Packages, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE}
library(gridExtra)
library(MASS)
library(ISLR)
library(car)
library(modelr)
library(gapminder)
library(broom)
library(e1071)
library(summarytools)
library(tidyverse)

# Choose the number you want as the basis of all your random number generation
# Can be ANY integer number 
set.seed(19971222) 
```
\newpage 
\section{Question 1}

\subsection{Part A}
```{r Q1 Part A, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE}
# insert code for to solve the question
```

Type your answers here. Or anywhere outside of the code chunk above. 
\subsection{Part b}

\section{Question 2}

\subsection{Part A}

\subsection{Part b}
